issues.description: First effect trigger should be 'Activated' (main card ability), not 'OnPlay'. Main abilities are player-activated, not automatic on play.
Rest action missing required filter for {East Blue} type Characters. Should include filter with type constraint.

PlayFromHand action is incorrect. Card text says 'Set up to 1 of your [Kuro] cards as active' — this means activate an existing card on board, not play from hand. Should use 'Rest' or similar board activation mechanic, not 'PlayFromHand'.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action has no basis in provided card text. This effect should not exist.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may rest 1 of your {East Blue} type Characters: Set up to 1 of your [Kuro] cards as active.
